outliers: Holistic Judge: scored 5 vs median 3 - judged candidate as having some acknowledgment while others saw complete failure to address emotional state
Holistic Judge: scored 5 vs median 2 - interpreted practical advice as policy grounding while others saw complete lack of company-specific policy information

assessment: The candidate's performance was severely inadequate across all criteria. They failed to acknowledge the customer's frustration about prior failed attempts and urgent bill deadline, provided only generic advice that ignored the customer's stated history, and demonstrated no understanding of company-specific policies. The responses showed no ownership of the issue, instead deflecting responsibility back to the customer with suggestions already proven ineffective. This represents a complete failure to function as a company representative in a support scenario.
judge_agreement: All judges strongly agreed on poor resolution quality (scores 1-3) and noted the candidate's failure to take ownership. Judges agreed the candidate provided only generic advice, though the Holistic Judge was slightly more lenient on empathy and policy clarity. All flagged the critical issue of the candidate not acting as a proper company representative despite the scenario context.
